name: Mapping Relationships Between Documentary Standards, Regulations, Frameworks, and Guidelines (STRM)
owner: National Institute of Standards and Technology (NIST)
description: Mapping Relationships Between Documentary Standards, Regulations, Frameworks, and Guidelines (STRM). NIST publication NIST.IR.8477.

license.notes: Work of NIST is in the public domain in the United States per Section 105 of the US Copyright Act.

current_extraction.notes: Structured the IR 8477 mapping methodology into three companion files: ir-8477-mapping-styles.{csv,json} (5 rows — one per mapping style: crosswalk, supportive, strm, structural, custom — with the canonical definition pulled from the markdown), ir-8477-relationship-types.{csv,json} (12 rows — one per (style, type) pair, canonical type definitions), and ir-8477-strm-rationales.{csv,json} (3 rows — syntactic/semantic/functional rationale dimensions for STRM).

notes: Auto-generated bulk metadata. Title/description from marker meta + README. Fields like Wikipedia URL, published date, and category-specific relations were not populated; enrich as needed.

extraction_history.notes: Extracted via marker (PDF -> markdown) before the SecID-mirror reorg. Structured CSV/JSON extraction is TODO for most NIST publications.
